title: pseudognaphalium beneolens
intro: Pseudognaphalium beneolens, also known as the California everlasting, is a perennial herb in the daisy family native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high levels of sesquiterpene lactones and essential oils. The health benefits of Pseudognaphalium beneolens include reducing inflammation, calming the nervous system, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions. Pseudognaphalium beneolens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in topical creams and salves for skin issues.
